overall.description: First-person exploration of a luxurious art deco hotel lobby in a cyberpunk game setting. The player ascends a grand staircase, traverses a dimly lit upper corridor, and overlooks the main hall before approaching an exit to the urban exterior.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand art deco hotel lobby with suspended chandeliers

agents.ego_description: walking through the opulent lobby, observing the art deco chandeliers and yellow stained glass features

entered.detail: large suspended brass and glass chandeliers with warm yellow lighting
tall illuminated art deco stained glass feature wall with geometric patterns
polished marble tile flooring with geometric patterns
dark wood reception counter with art deco detailing
long red carpet runner leading through the lobby

segments.scene_description: The player explores a grand art deco lobby with high ceilings, suspended brass chandeliers, and a prominent yellow stained glass wall. The space features polished marble floors and a red carpet runner, with no other characters present.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand staircase with brass railings leading to upper level

events.description: moving from lobby floor toward staircase and beginning ascent to upper level

agents.ego_description: climbing the grand staircase, hand on brass railing, moving toward the upper floor

entered.detail: wide marble staircase with brass handrails ascending to upper level
polished brass Art Deco railings along the staircase
vertical illuminated wall fixtures with warm yellow light
tropical plants in planters at the top of the stairs

segments.scene_description: The player ascends a grand marble staircase with brass railings, passing wall sconces and potted plants. The main lobby chandeliers fall away below as the camera climbs toward the upper level.

scene_state.functional_zone: dimly lit upper corridor with wall lighting

events.description: entering darker upper corridor with reduced ambient light and narrower space

agents.ego_description: proceeding down the narrow upper corridor toward a distant light source

entered.detail: narrow hallway with dark walls and illuminated vertical light fixtures
dark polished marble wall panels with minimal reflection

segments.scene_description: The player walks through a dimly lit upper corridor with dark marble walls and vertical light fixtures. The space is narrow and enclosed, contrasting with the open lobby below, leading toward an opening at the far end.

events.description: emerging from dark corridor to upper balcony with panoramic view of lobby below

agents.ego_description: walking along the upper balcony, looking down at the lobby chandeliers and stained glass wall from above

entered.detail: glass and metal railing overlooking the lower lobby
stacked equipment boxes and construction materials on the balcony floor

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the corridor, the player walks along an upper balcony overlooking the grand lobby below. The art deco chandeliers and yellow stained glass wall are visible from above, while construction crates sit on the balcony floor near the glass railing.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition corridor leading to exterior exit

events.description: approaching doorway leading to exterior urban environment with visible city buildings

agents.ego_description: moving toward the exit doorway, transitioning from interior to exterior urban environment

entered.detail: large doorway with vertical light strips framing the exit to the city
view of cyberpunk city buildings and neon signs visible through the exit

segments.scene_description: The player approaches a doorway leading out of the building, with vertical light strips framing the exit. Through the doorway, the cyberpunk city exterior with tall buildings is visible, marking the transition from the opulent interior to the urban environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the opulent, expansive interior of an art deco lobby toward the dense urban exterior of a cyberpunk city. It begins on polished marble floors beneath suspended brass chandeliers and a yellow stained glass wall, before ascending a grand marble staircase that leaves the open lobby behind. The scene then shifts into a narrow, dimly lit upper corridor with dark marble walls and vertical light fixtures, creating a sense of enclosure. As the camera emerges from the corridor, it opens onto a balcony overlooking the grand hall and its chandeliers, passing construction crates near a glass railing. Finally, the movement leads toward a doorway framed by light strips, transitioning from the luxurious interior to a view of towering city buildings outside.
